commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a runtime config signature to cached ACP runtime handles and regression coverage so `tools.exec.security` / `safeBins` changes invalidate stale handle reuse.

Reproducibility: yes. there is a high-confidence source/proof-artifact path: add the PR regression to current main and run the focused ACP manager test, which the linked before log shows failing because `ensureSession` is called once after the config changes. I did not run tests locally because this was a read-only review.
